title: syngrammatopsis linearis
side_effects: Syngrammatopsis linearis can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps, which may be caused by excessive consumption of its toxic compounds. Prolonged use can also lead to liver damage and kidney problems, as the plant's alkaloids can interfere with normal organ function. In severe cases, improper use of Syngrammatopsis linearis can cause seizures, coma, and even death. It is crucial to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health purposes to minimize the risk of adverse reactions.
